title: Supply Chain Manager - TVS Supply Chain Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - TVS Supply Chain Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!
